zh.Higham Gobion, Bedfordshire, England: 英國貝德福爾希加姆 格比
zh.Higham, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Gobion III於大約1219年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Gobion II41歲，母親Agnes Merlay41歲。他於大約1244年與Matilda結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1275年6月3日之前在英國諾薩普頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Gobion III于大约1219年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Gobion II41岁，母亲Agnes Merlay41岁。他于大约1244年与Matilda结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1275年6月3日之前在英国諾薩普頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gobion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Bhola, Boodram, Mohan, Narine, Parmanand, Pooran, Shiva.  French Andre, Marcelle, Pierre.
French: from a pet form of   Gobert  .

variants.name: Gobert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Antoine, Marie-France, Monique.

French, German, and English (London): from a medieval personal name, Godebert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was popularized in England by the Normans, and probably absorbed an Old English form Godbeorht.

variants.name: Goben
meanings: Altered form of Gobin , a surname of English or French origin. In some cases however, the surname Goben (possibly of German origin; see 2 below) was changed to Gobin.
German (Göben): habitational name from Gobbin on Rügen Island (Pomerania) or perhaps from any of several places called Goben in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Gobion III was born about 1219, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Gobion II, was 41 and his mother, Agnes Merlay, was 41. He married Matilda about 1244. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 3 June 1275, in Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Gobion III est né environ 1219, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Gobion II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes Merlay, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Matilda environ 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 3 juin 1275, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Gobion III um 1219 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Gobion II 41 und seine Mutter Agnes Merlay 41. Er hat um 1244 Matilda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 3. Juni 1275 in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Gobion III è nato il circa 1219 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Gobion II, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Merlay, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Matilda circa 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 3 giugno 1275, nel Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Gobion IIIが約1219年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Gobion IIは41歳，母Agnes Merlayは41歳であった。約1244年にMatildaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1275年6月3日以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Gobion III(이)가 대략 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Gobion II(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Merlay(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1244년 Matilda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1275년 6월 3일 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Gobion III nasceu aproximadamente 1219, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Gobion II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Merlay, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda aproximadamente 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 3 de junho de 1275, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Gobion III родился около 1219 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Gobion II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Merlay, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda около 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 3 июнь 1275 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Gobion III nació aproximadamente 1219, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Gobion II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes Merlay, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Matilda aproximadamente 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 3 de junio de 1275, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
